meta.patch: v16: REBUILT compatibility matrix from ecosystem+current_class rules + TPM ground truth + HYBRID(TK-309R1) exception + negative-rule filtering. Symmetric edges (Nozzle<->TipBody fixed). All 5 official UPSELL types verified 8/8.
meta.fix_notes: v11d→v11e (2 rounds): All validation warnings fixed. Round 1: TPMs added for 7 no-TPM torches, 21 missing mandatory roles filled, 96 orphan parts linked, YMSA-500W/508W ecosystem→HYBRID, 4 consumable sets corrected. Round 2: 3 remaining D-type orphan tips linked, TK-308RW→HYBRID, 6 remaining missing-role issues fixed, consumable set mixed-ecosystem resolved by correcting part ecosystems (N-tips in WX context→HYBRID, TIG structural parts→TIG).

meta.part_role_patch_note: Filled part_role for 42 consumable_set items (role = part.category). Eliminates engine category-fallback.
meta.editorial_picks_note: Auto-generated for 10 high-value Tip seeds via co-occurrence in TPM

patch_v11f.rationale: Cat01 p2 spec table groups TL-20/TL-20F/TL-20L and CSH-35/-35K/-35F/-35L/-35G as distinct SKUs sharing common spec rows; Cat02 p8 confirms each variant has a distinct Torch Body part number (e.g. 038003/038004 for CSH-35K). TA-350 is from Cat04 p9 (TIG torch for automatic welding machines). FXSA/FXSW are properly classified FXS per schema (Cat01 p10 FXS series).

meta.patch_notes: v11h: added p_model_codes, d_model_codes, o_part_nos, o_model_codes fields. Filled missing cross-brand mappings from CATALOG_02.pdf p5-15. Fixed 001005.d_part_nos (removed incorrect U4167H16).
meta.patch_notes_v11i: v11i: Cat01 full verification patch. Fixed 3 duty-cycle spec issues (CSH-50WX: duty_co2 60→100, +duty_mag=60; YMSA-250RA: duty 50→60). Cross-brand (Tip/Nozzle/Orifice/Insulator/Conduit): 100% pass vs Cat01 — no changes needed. All 75 Cat01 torch model_codes confirmed present. 45 accessory/fume SKUs from Cat01 still missing — deferred to v11j (need spec data).
meta.patch_notes_v11j: v11j: Cat03 (Air-Cooled Robotic Torches, 2015 edition) full verification + extension. Phase 1: 2 spec fixes (has_shock_sensor=False for ACC-308RX, TK-308RX). Phase 2: ADDED 45 new parts (5 ACC-308RR power cables RA3RN0090-0130, 8 TK-508RX/TK-308RX detachable clamp parts 3002011-3002043, 2 YMENS-308R MTO bodies, 22 DSRC ecosystem parts, 2 YMHS collision sensor units, 4 peripherals, 2 misc). Phase 3: SYNCED 128 Cat03-derived torch-part mappings. DOCUMENTED CONFLICTS: TK-508RR/RX rated_mag (Cat01=400, Cat03=430 — kept 400 per Cat01 newer); ACC-308RR dim tolerances (Cat01 ±0.2, Cat03 ±0.3 — kept Cat01 values).
meta.patch_notes_v11k: v11k: Cat04 (TIG Welding Torches, 2015 ed) full verification + extension. Phase A: 39 spec patches (added weight_g/duty_cycle_pct/has_cylinder, fixed TA-18SC.tungsten_mm typo 0.5-4.8→0.5-4.0). Phase C: ADDED 139 TIG parts (stubby collets, switches, switch cables, power cable adapters, extension kits, power/gas/water hoses, cable covers, WR-100 coolant system, TA-200/301/500 internal parts, tungsten grinders PIRANHA II/III). Phase D: SYNCED 374 TPMs. DOCUMENTED CONFLICTS: TA-26 and FX-9 tungsten_mm differ between Cat01 (newer) and Cat04 (kept Cat01).

negative_rules.description: N-type Tip cannot use D-type Orifice
negative_rules.incompatibility_reason: N-type Tip geometry (M6×1, 45mm) is incompatible with D Orifice S (023014). D Orifice: 20mm × 13.5mm outer, different seating thread. N Orifice S (003002): 21mm × 15.5mm outer. Physical mismatch → gas leak.

negative_rules.description: N-type Tip cannot use D-type Insulator
negative_rules.incompatibility_reason: N-type Tip requires N Insulator (004002 or 004001). D Insulator S (023015) has different bore and seating geometry — improper fit causes arc instability and potential torch damage.

negative_rules.description: N-type Tip cannot use D-type Nozzle
negative_rules.incompatibility_reason: N-type Tip body uses N-system threading; D Nozzle (023012/013) has D-type thread engagement geometry. Physical incompatibility.

negative_rules.description: D-type Tip cannot use N-type Orifice in standard torch context
negative_rules.incompatibility_reason: D-type Tip (M6×1, 40.5mm) normally requires D-type Orifice (023014). N Orifice S (003002) does not seat correctly in D-type torch body. EXCEPTION: TK-309R1 is a HYBRID torch that uses D-tips with N-type orifice/insulator BY DESIGN — see rule TK309R1_HYBRID_EXCEPTION.

negative_rules.description: D-type Tip cannot use N-type Insulator in standard torch context
negative_rules.incompatibility_reason: D-type Tip requires D Insulator S (023015) in standard D-torch context. N Insulator S (004002) has different bore geometry — improper seating. EXCEPTION: TK-309R1 hybrid torch uses D-tips with N-insulator by design.

negative_rules.description: D-type Tip cannot use N-type Nozzle in standard torch context
negative_rules.incompatibility_reason: D-type Tip normally requires D Nozzle (023012/013) in standard torch context. N-type Nozzle bore and thread geometry differ from D-type. EXCEPTION: TK-309R1 uses D-tips with N Nozzle 16mm 63L (001013) by design.

negative_rules.description: TK-309R1 HYBRID: D-type Tips ARE compatible with N-type nozzle system
negative_rules.note: TK-309R1 Parts Drawing explicitly shows D-type Tips (023008/009/010) with N Nozzle 16mm 63L (001013), N Orifice S (003002), N Insulator S (004002), and CS Tip Body A (036001). This is INTENTIONAL DESIGN, not an error. Must be encoded as exception to general ecosystem lock rules.

negative_rules.description: Rocket-shaped Tip requires Small Dia Nozzle 73L — not standard nozzle
negative_rules.incompatibility_reason: Rocket-shaped Tip (φ3 body, 002322-002325) requires N Small Dia Nozzle 73L (001016). Standard nozzle bore is too large — poor gas shielding and arc instability.

negative_rules.description: Small Dia Long Nozzle 100L requires long tip — not standard 45mm tip
negative_rules.incompatibility_reason: N Small Dia Long Nozzle (001004, 100mm) requires a long tip. Standard 45mm N-type tips are too short — tip won't reach proper position, causing poor contact and gas shielding failure.

negative_rules.description: WX Water-Cooled Nozzle requires WX Orifice, not standard N Orifice
negative_rules.incompatibility_reason: WX Water-Cooled Nozzle system requires WX Water-Cooled Nozzle Orifice (034121). Standard N Orifice S (003002) does not fit WX assembly — coolant hose connections are incompatible.

negative_rules.description: DSRC-3531 torch requires exclusive DSRC Nozzle (023501) — standard D nozzles DO NOT fit
negative_rules.incompatibility_reason: DSRC-3531 uses a special DSRC Nozzle (023501, bore φ13, OD φ16.8mm, 64L). Standard D Nozzle No.8 12mm (023012, 70L) and D Nozzle No.10 16mm (023013, 70L) have different lengths and mounting geometry — they do not fit DSRC-3531 torch body.
negative_rules.note: Parts Drawing Cat03 p.13-14 explicitly shows DSRC Nozzle (part 2 = 023501 = 023501 DSRC Nozzle).

negative_rules.description: WX Orifices (034120/034121) are incompatible with standard N nozzles (001001-001016)
negative_rules.incompatibility_reason: WX Orifices have different seating dimensions than N Orifice S/L. Standard N nozzles (001002, 001001, etc.) use N Orifice geometry. WX ecosystem parts (034115/034116/061450) require WX Orifice (034120/034121).

negative_rules.description: N 350A Nozzle cannot use N 500A Orifice L (size mismatch)
negative_rules.incompatibility_reason: N Orifice L (003001, 26mm length) is designed for 500A torch geometry. 350A nozzle assembly uses N Orifice S (003002, 21mm) — length mismatch causes improper gas distribution.

negative_rules.description: N/D Aluminum tips cannot be used with CO2 or MAG process
negative_rules.incompatibility_reason: Aluminum wire requires Ar 100% shielding (MIG process). CO2 causes oxidation of aluminum weld pool. Use 002023/024/018/019 (N) or 023043/044 (D) ONLY with MIG process.

negative_rules.description: WP pure tungsten MUST NOT be used with DC or on steel
negative_rules.incompatibility_reason: WP (pure tungsten) requires AC process to form balled tip for Al welding. On DC/steel: tip won't ball, arc is unstable, electrode contaminates weld. Use WL15 (018320-325) or WC20 (018340-345) for DC/steel.

negative_rules.description: TCC tips (M8×1.25) CANNOT use standard N/D tip body (M6×1)
negative_rules.incompatibility_reason: TCC tips have M8×1.25 thread vs standard M6×1. Physical mismatch — tip will not thread into N/D body. TCC tips require dedicated TCC tip body (part 023121 Copper Nozzle system).

negative_rules.description: Gas Lens Collet Body REQUIRES Gas Lens Insulator
negative_rules.incompatibility_reason: Gas lens collet body (45V-prefix) must be assembled with corresponding gas lens insulator (54N01 for Family B, 54N63 for large-dia). Without insulator, gas lens body cannot seal properly — gas flow escapes.
